summary: Add explicit per-send AI context toggles for current source, diagnostics, parameters, and viewer screenshot with bounded tagged serialization; expose the current-file context in the runtime-wired panel.

decisions.decision: Context sections are opt-in per send (source, diagnostics, parameters, screenshot), serialized with explicit tags, and bounded with visible truncation markers before entering the provider request.
decisions.rationale: FR-10.3 makes each context source user-toggleable; bounded application-owned serialization prevents accidental unbounded prompt growth and makes disclosure deterministic.

testEvidence.criterion: Context serialization includes only enabled sections and discloses truncation; the panel and Workbench remain green.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused context, AI panel, and Workbench suites once after integration.

red.outcome: RED: the context module and panel integration were not yet present before this unit began.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/ai/AiConversationPanel.test.tsx tests/application/ai/ai-context.test.ts
green.outcome: GREEN: Test Files 3 passed (3); Tests 25 passed (25); Duration 4.38s.

testEvidence.criterion: The context toggle implementation remains type-safe and source-policy clean.
testEvidence.test: Run TypeScript and repository lint/source policy once after the bounded integration.

red.outcome: RED: the context toggle implementation had not yet been integrated.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false; pnpm.cmd lint
green.outcome: GREEN: TypeScript exited 0; Checked 429 files in 212ms with source policy passed.

questions: Workbench currently supplies source context and empty diagnostics/parameter arrays; wiring live diagnostics, parameter snapshots, and captured viewer screenshots remains a later context-provider unit.
attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
